daily_loop: Pick the highest-impact client money problem.
Route safe research, offer design, sandbox build, sales materials, and quality checks to specialist bots.
Score outputs by usefulness, evidence, client value, and approval risk.
Package the best result into a demo, prospectus, client offer, or approval packet.
Keep live money, outreach, ads, contracts, trading, and deployments blocked until approved.
buddy_example.example_offer: Buddy sells a supervised AI workforce that helps clients discover revenue, save costs, build apps and automations, test ideas, and package sellable systems.
buddy_example.name: Buddy

client_value_promises: Save money with automation and monitoring.
Package AI employees as sellable services.
Build sandbox demos before spending money.
Create client-ready offers, prospectus pages, and proof packets.
mission: Every DreamCo bot practices helping clients make autonomous money through sandbox-first discovery, offers, demos, tests, packaging, and approval-gated live action.

revenue_practice_lanes.label: Problem Discovery
revenue_practice_lanes.practice: Find expensive, urgent, repeated client problems from public sources and user-provided context.

revenue_practice_lanes.label: Offer Design
revenue_practice_lanes.practice: Design a clear service, app, automation, course, report, or AI employee offer that solves the problem.

revenue_practice_lanes.label: Pricing Modeling
revenue_practice_lanes.practice: Model subscription, one-time, usage-based, retainer, referral, license, or performance-fee pricing.

revenue_practice_lanes.label: Lead Research
revenue_practice_lanes.practice: Build public-source ideal-client profiles and target segments without contacting anyone.

revenue_practice_lanes.label: Sales Materials
revenue_practice_lanes.practice: Draft landing page copy, demo scripts, prospectus pages, proposals, and objection handling.

revenue_practice_lanes.label: Sandbox Delivery
revenue_practice_lanes.practice: Build a safe demo, workflow, API test, simulation, dashboard, or report that proves the offer.

revenue_practice_lanes.label: Automation Packaging
revenue_practice_lanes.practice: Package repeatable workflows into reusable bot systems, libraries, templates, and checklists.

revenue_practice_lanes.label: Partnership Paths
revenue_practice_lanes.practice: Find safe partner, supplier, affiliate, reseller, referral, and marketplace paths.

revenue_practice_lanes.label: Contract Opportunities
revenue_practice_lanes.practice: Search for public RFPs, grants, procurement needs, and contract categories the offer could serve.

revenue_practice_lanes.label: Retention Growth
revenue_practice_lanes.practice: Design upsell, renewal, support, education, reporting, and client success loops.

revenue_practice_lanes.label: Cost Savings
revenue_practice_lanes.practice: Find ways to save the client money through automation, consolidation, monitoring, and prevention.

revenue_practice_lanes.label: Data Productization
revenue_practice_lanes.practice: Turn rights-cleared operational outputs into reusable data, benchmarks, templates, or eval packs.
